instruction: Route this email to the correct support category.

email.subject: Order 71034 — follow-up
email.body: Hi! Following up on order 71034. The status update Monday said the package was 'received at the regional facility', but the next-day delivery window we paid extra for has come and gone. Hoping someone can chase this down before our launch event tomorrow morning.

rationale_hint: Paraphrase without obvious keywords ('shipping', 'tracking', 'delay' don't appear). The requester paraphrases a missed next-day delivery window after a regional-facility receipt stop, and asks for someone to chase the delivery. A side mention of paid-extra shipping doesn't shift the ask to Billing — the request is to locate the package → Shipping.

provenance.source_benchmark: CRMArena-Pro Case Routing / Activity Priority Understanding (Huang et al., 2025)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed email texts; task semantics follow the CRMArena-Pro routing/disambiguation pattern. The five-category label set is mirrored from cases.issue_category in experiments/seed_crm.py so the routing decision is consistent with the local CRM schema. High-stratum sub-class: paraphrase_no_keywords.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (email texts and task design); benchmark semantics reference only
